title: IAEA confirms projectile struck 350m from Bushehr nuclear reactor, killing one
description: The IAEA confirmed the 4th attack on Bushehr since Feb 28. One security staff killed. No radiation increase detected. Director Grossi: nuclear plants must never be attacked. Via Al Jazeera.

mediaUrls.label: Russia slams second US-Israeli strike at Bushehr nuclear reactor | Al Jazeera

title: Strait of Hormuz: only 221 ships crossed since March 1 vs 120/day peacetime rate
description: Iran now operates a 3-tier system: friendly nations (China, Russia, India) transit free; neutral pay levies; hostile banned. 27 commercial ships attacked since March 1 including 13 tankers. Via UANI.

mediaUrls.label: Strait of Hormuz blocked: Global trade reroutes | Al Jazeera

title: IEA warns largest oil supply disruption in history: 4.5-5M bbl/day lost, Brent near $120
description: Gulf flows collapsed from 20M bbl/day to a trickle. Brent crude up 55% in March alone — a record monthly gain. IEA weighing more strategic reserve releases. Analysts warn $150/bbl if Hormuz stays shut. Via CNBC.

mediaUrls.label: IEA releasing 400M barrels of oil to counter Iran war disruption | CBS News

title: Iran death toll: 3,519+ killed including 1,607 civilians and 244 children (HRANA)
description: Day 36 casualty count per HRANA. Iran Health Ministry reports 2,076 killed (lower figure). 15 US troops killed, 300+ wounded. 23 killed in Lebanon on April 4 alone. Via NPR / Al Jazeera.

mediaUrls.label: US, Israel continue to pound Iran as death toll rises | Al Jazeera

title: UNHCR: 3.2 million displaced in Iran, 1 million in Lebanon, 45M face food insecurity
description: Massive humanitarian crisis. 750,000 Afghan refugees in Iran face heightened risk. Israeli strikes hit hospitals including Gandhi Hospital in northern Tehran. War disrupts fertilizer feedstock supply chains. Via UNHCR / The Hill.

mediaUrls.label: UN warns 3 million Iranians displaced by Israeli and US attacks | Al Jazeera

title: Iranian drones set Kuwait's largest oil refinery (Mina Al-Ahmadi) on fire
description: Iranian drone attacks hit Kuwait desalination plant, 2 power plants, and finance ministry. BAPCO oil storage in Bahrain also struck. Dozens of refineries, oil fields, gas plants damaged across Gulf in 5 weeks. Via NPR.

mediaUrls.label: Drone attack on Kuwait: Parts of major refinery shut down | Al Jazeera

title: Iran downs 2 US warplanes (F-15E, A-10) using new advanced defense system
description: Iran's IRGC claims downing of F-15E Strike Eagle and A-10 Warthog on April 3-4. US Black Hawk on rescue ops also hit. Crew member rescued after search. Challenges US air dominance claims. Via Al Jazeera.

mediaUrls.label: US F-15 fighter shot down over Iran | CNN

title: Lebanon death toll reaches 1,318 killed as Israel bombs bridges; 1M+ displaced
description: 23 killed on April 4 alone. Over 1 million displaced in Lebanon. Israel bombed multiple bridges. Gaza cumulative death toll exceeds 72,000. Via Al Jazeera.

mediaUrls.label: Israel strikes key bridge in Lebanon | Al Jazeera

title: War CO2 emissions surpass Iceland's annual output in just 14 days: 5M+ tonnes
description: Oil depot strikes in Tehran caused black rain. 85+ trapped tankers in Persian Gulf pose massive oil spill risk. Attacks on Dena frigate near Sri Lanka triggered marine oil spill. Via AA / CEOBS.

mediaUrls.label: The Iran war's toll on public health and climate | Al Jazeera

title: Gaza cumulative death toll exceeds 72,000 as war expands across region
description: Palestinian death toll in Gaza surpasses 72,000. Conflict now spans Gaza, Lebanon (1,318 killed), Iran (3,519+ killed), and Gulf states. Via Al Jazeera.

mediaUrls.label: Gaza death toll | Al Jazeera
